title: Operating Model
role: Plain-language operating map for how intake, tasks, decisions, records, and AI-assisted work move through the company.

title: Client Discovery
role: Front door for client readiness, workspace ownership, handoff planning, and tenant-of-record decisions.

title: Agent Setup
role: Controlled setup notes for agents and assisted workflows before they are promoted into client or operating use.

title: Access Model
role: Simple access zones and approval rules for internal, partner, builder, reviewer, and client-specific surfaces.

title: External Sharing Rules
role: Stage 7 sharing posture translated into day-to-day operating rules.

title: App Grants
role: Review surface for app grants, delegated permissions, risk notes, and owner-approved resting state.
